zh.lifeSummary: 當Gen. Georgios Palaiologos於1064年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia37歲，母親Miss Kurtikina31歲。他於1088年與Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1119年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gen. Georgios Palaiologos于1064年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia37岁，母亲Miss Kurtikina31岁。他于1088年与Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1119年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Georgios
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Andreas, Christos, Demetrios, Ioannis, Loucas, Markos, Yannis, Anastasios, Aristos, Constantine, Costas, Dimitrios.
Greek (typically Cypriot): patronymic from the genitive case of the personal name Geōrgios (see George ).

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Gen. Georgios Palaiologos was born in 1064, in İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia, was 37 and his mother, Miss Kurtikina, was 31. He married Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire in 1088, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1119, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gen. Georgios Palaiologos est né en 1064, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Miss Kurtikina, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire en 1088, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1119, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gen. Georgios Palaiologos 1064 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia 37 und seine Mutter Miss Kurtikina 31. Er hat 1088 in İstanbul, Türkei Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1119 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gen. Georgios Palaiologos è nato il nel 1064 nel İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Miss Kurtikina, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire nel 1088, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1119, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gen. Georgios Palaiologosが1064年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamiaは37歳，母Miss Kurtikinaは31歳であった。1088年にトルコイスタンブルでAnna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1119年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gen. Georgios Palaiologos(이)가 1064년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Miss Kurtikina(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1088년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1119년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gen. Georgios Palaiologos nasceu em 1064, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Miss Kurtikina, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire em 1088, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1119, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gen. Georgios Palaiologos родился в 1064 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss Kurtikina, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire в 1088 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1119 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gen. Georgios Palaiologos nació en 1064, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Nikephoros Palaiologos "Duke of Mesopotamia, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Miss Kurtikina, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire en 1088, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1119, a la edad de 55 años.
